title: rosa × centifolia bullata
intro: Rosa × centifolia bullata, also known as the double bull rose, is a fragrant and ornamental flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. The plant's petals and leaves have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can aid in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rosa × centifolia bullata include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting healing. The plant's extracts can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat a variety of skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
